name: SKY130 Bandgap Voltage Reference
description: CMOS bandgap reference providing stable voltage and bias currents for the bio-AFE signal chain

vref_v.description: Output reference voltage at nominal conditions (TT, 27C, 1.8V)

tc_ppm_c.description: Temperature coefficient of V_REF from -40C to 125C

psrr_dc_db.description: Power supply rejection ratio at DC (V_REF variation / VDD variation)

line_regulation_mv_v.description: V_REF change per volt of supply change (1.62V to 1.98V)

startup_time_us.description: Time from power-on to V_REF within 1% of final value
